articles.title: Meeting highlights from the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) 23-26 February 2026 - European Medicines Agency
articles.description: 12 new medicines recommended for approval; another six medicines recommended for extension of their therapeutic indications
articles.content:
12 new medicines recommended for approval
EMAs human medicines committee (CHMP) recommended 12 medicines for approval at its February 2026 meeting.
